code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: oshitopolwa shi li shi ninge oshilando sheshell oshi li shi kwate osho sha shi li shi ningwa; omunamukuli oku na oshinakugwanithwa shokuhupula ombapila; OSHI NA SHOKU ninga oshitopolwa shi li shi ningwa nande osha pewa, nande oshi li shi tindi okuningwa ku na oshi li shi ningwe.

Ninga oshikwatele shaDSA sha pombanda, shi li shi ningwe osho sha shi li shi ningwa mu ndjila yaPEM, oshi li shi galuke mu ndjila yoshityapwa.

1. `openssl dsaparam -out <efayla lya pombanda lya shi li shi kwate oma-param> <oshikwatele shoshikwatele>`
2. `openssl gendsa <efayla lya pombanda lya shi li shi kwate oma-param>`

Oshilonga shokukutha oshilomwa sheshell nokukwata oshityo shasho; omukuthi okwa li na ondjila yokukutha ombapila; OTA HAA SHOKU ninga oshilonga shashi nashi osha pewa osho osho shi tindi okushanga shi li shi li.

Kutha oshikaha shaDSA sha pombanda, shi yambale sha tashi longitha omutindo gwaPEM, nashi galula sha tashi li oshityo.
Oshiholelwa: kutha oshilomwa sheshell oku kutha efaile lyaDSA lyoparam neshikaha shaDSA sha pombanda sha tashi li momutindo gwa: 
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <efaile lyokuninga lyokutula oparam> <oshikaha shoshikaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <efaile lyokuninga lyokutula oparam>`
Owa dulu okulonga `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` oku ninga edhina lyefaile lyokuninga lyoparam lyaDSA lyoshikaha shoshikaha.

@galula Oshikaha shaDSA sha pombanda sha kuthwa momutindo gwaPEM, oshowo NULL ngele oshike osha puka.

oshitopolwa shi li na oshilonga shokukutha ekomando lyoshisheelo nokukwata oshilyo shasho; omukuthi ota li na ondjila yokukutha ombapila; OTA VULU OKU SHI LONGA oshitopolwa shoshilonga shi li na oshilonga sha pewa, ashike shi li na oshilonga shokushanga shi li na oshilonga shokushitopolwa.

Shanga oshikaha shi li na oshilonga sha DSA, shi li na oshilonga shokushitopolwa shi li na oshilonga sha PEM, nashi li na oshilonga shokushitopolwa shi li na oshilonga shokushitopolwa.
Oshilonga shokushitopolwa: kutha ekomando lyoshisheelo oku shanga eparamfaile ya DSA nokushanga oshikaha shi li na oshilonga sha DSA shi li na oshilonga shokushitopolwa: 
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <efayile yokuninginina yokuninginina> <oshikaha shi li na oshilonga> `
2. `openssl gendsa <efayile yokuninginina yokuninginina>`

Tunga ofayela yomukalo, nyola oshiningwa sha pewwa mo, na u gandje edhina lyofayela oku lesha oku lesha.
Tunga ofayela yokukala, nyola oshiningwa sha pewwa mo, na u ye ofayela oshiholelwa sho shi leshele oku leshelwa.
Tunga ofayela yomukalo, nyola oshiholelwa sha pewwa mo, na u galuke ofayela oshiholelwa shi li nale oku leshelwa.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.

Ondjandjagulukile oshitya shiXML oye wo u gandje omahokololo gopashiyona gwaaniwa oshinakugwanithwa shomunamimvo nokufuta. Oshitya shiXML oshi na oshitya shiikutu shiikutu:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>

@param xml_data Oshitya shiXML eshi na omahokololo gopashiyona.
@param username Oshinakugwanithwa shopashiyona a kongo.

fw_segments_by_variant: Oku na oshitya shomukwashigwana, kutha oshitya shomukwashigwana osho shi na oshitya shomukwashigwana. Oshitya shomukwashigwana osho shi na oshitya shomukwashigwana.
Oku na oshikwatitho shomukwati, tulula oshikwatitho shomukwati osho shi li pehala lyoshikwatitho. Oshikwatitho osho oshi li pehala lyoshikwatitho.
Oku na oshinakugwanithwa shomuntu, kutha omakaya oshinakugwanithwa. Oshinakugwanithwa osha ningwa moshinakugwanithwa.
Oku na oshitya shomukwashi, kutha omakondo gokombinga yoshitya. Oshitya osha li sha ningwa moshitya.
Oku na oshitya shomukwashigwana, kutha oshitya shomukwashigwana osho shi na oshitya shomukwashigwana. Oshitya shomukwashigwana osho shi na oshitya shomukwashigwana.

Oku na olisti yomapassword gaakwashigwana, shandisa PKCS5_PBKDF2_HMAC oku hashila omapassword. Oto shandisa SHA-256 (nga EVP_sha256()), osalt oshinayi shimwe nokule omahashi oga tulwa, na 10000 omaiteresheni. Ganda omahashi gaakwashigwana na osalt osha shandiswa oku hashila oku gandwa mondjandjeko.

Oku na olisto yoompasholi yooomwaalu, shandisa PKCS5_PBKDF2_HMAC oku hashila oompasholi. Oto shandisa SHA-256 (nga EVP_sha256()), oosalt oondjaba ndjika nokuhasha, na 10000 oondjato. Ugalula oompasholi dhashilwa na oosalt dha shandiswa oku hashila oku shunwa mokudatabesa.

prompts_en:
Given an offset, print an integer value of a positive random number plus the offset to stdout. If anything goes wrong, print nothing.

@param offset: the offset to add to the random number
fw_segments_by_variant:
Oku na offset, shanga oshinima shiintanyo shomunomwa uunene woshikukuta shaadhika pe offset ku stdout. Ngele oshike osha ya po, inashi shange nande shike.

@param offset: offset oshaadhikwa koshikukuta shaadhika.
Oku na offset, holola oshinima shoshitenda sha positive sha random sha dhenga oshinima shoshitenda sha offset ku stdout. Oshinima shina sha shoka sha shoka, holola oshinima shina.

Oku na offset, shanga oshinonime sha integer sha nomba ya random ya positive oshowo offset ku stdout. Ngele oshike osha ya po, inashi shanga nande shike.

@param offset: offset oyo oyi djuwe ku nomba ya random

Oku na offset, shanga oshinima shiintanyo shomunomwa uunene woshikukuta shaadhika pe offset ku stdout. Ngele oshike osha ya po, inashi shange nande shike.

@param offset: offset oshaadhikwa koshikukuta shaadhika.

prompts_en: Function to find the index of a key in the header dictionary, returns -1 if not found
fw_segments_by_variant: Oshilonga oku li shi iindekisi ya oshitya mo dikushonari yomutwe, osha galula -1 ngele oshitya inashi monwa.
Oshinima shokuninga okupeha ondhindhilikilo yokiiho moshikundaneki shomutumba woshikundaneki, osha galula -1 ngele oshiwanekwa.
Oshinima shi shi okupeha ondhindhililo yokiiho moshikundaneki shendhindhililo, oshi galula -1 ngele oshiwi.

Tula oshiholelwa shi oshipewa moshikundaneki shendhindhililo yeyamukulo lyoshili oshipewa pokati kaashitya oshipewa.
Oshinima shi oshi dhiladhila aashitya oshiholelwa oshikuti: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Osha tulwa ngeenge omaakiiho 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', sha landulathana.
Oshiholelwa shoshiholelwa oshi leshwa momeho oku lesha kombinga yomunamimvo.
Ngele aashitya oshiholelwa oshipewa oshi li po, oshikundaneki shendhindhililo shoshili oshipewa oshi na sho. Ngele oshike osha ya po, oshinima oshi galula oshikundaneki shendhindhililo shomukalo gwawo oshipewa ngeenge oshike osha ningwa.
Oshinima shi shi okupeha ondjato yokiiho moshidikishonale yoshitenda, oshi shi galutha -1 ngele oku ha yi monika

Tula oshiningwanima osha pewa moshidikishonale yoshitenda yomayamukulo oya li po, pevi londjila oya gandjwa.
Oshinima shi shi otashi dhiladhila ondjila dha oshiningwanima dha landula: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Oha dhi tulwa ngeenge omapeha 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', sha landula.
Oshiningwanima oshi leshwa moombidhidhi dhomukwashigwana.
Ngele ondjila ya oshiningwanima oya gandjwa oya li nawa, oshitenda shomayamukulo osha pya osho oku shi na. Ngele oshike osha ya po, oshinima shi shi oshi shi galutha oshitenda shoshitenda shomayamukulo sho sha li sho, oku na oshike shoka sha ningwa.
Oshilonga shoku longa ondjila yokeyi moshikundaneki sheheader, osha galula -1 ngele kayi monika.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: oshitopolwa shi li shi ninge oshilando sheshell osho shi kwate oshityo shasho; omunamululi oku na oshinakugwanithwa shokuhupula ombapila; OSHI NA SHOKU ninga oshitopolwa shashi nokuningwa shaashi osha pewa nande oshi li shi tseyithwe ku tameke oku shi longifapo.

Tunga oshikaha shaDSA sha pombanda, shi tumine ngeendjila dhaPEM, osho shi galula ngeendjila dhomutse.
Oshiholelwa: ninga oshilando sheshell oku tunga efayela lyaDSA lyoparameta nokutunga oshikaha shaDSA sha pombanda ngeendjila dhi landula:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <efayela lya pombanda lyoku hulitha oparameta> <oshikaha shomule> `
2. `openssl gendsa <efayela lya pombanda lyoku hulitha oparameta>`
Owa dulu oku longifapo `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` oku tunga edhina lyefayela lya pombanda lyoparameta lyaDSA lyoshiholelwa.

@galula Oshikaha shaDSA sha pombanda sha tungwa ngeendjila dhaPEM, osho oshi li NULL ngele oshike osha puka.

oshitopolwa shi li na oshilonga shokukutha omukalo gwoshilando nokukwata oshityo shasho; omukuthi okwa li na ondjila yokuhupula ombapila; OSHI NA SHOKU ninga oshitopolwa shashi nokuningwa shaashi osha pewa nande osho shi li na oshilonga shokushanga shaashi oshi li na oshilonga shokushitwa.

Shanga oshikaha sha DSA sha pombanda, shi shunitha shaashi oshi li na omukalo gwa PEM, nashi shunitha shaashi oshi li na oshityo.
Oshiholelwa: kutha omikalo dhoshiando dha shanga eparameta faila lya DSA nokikaha sha DSA sha pombanda shaashi oshi li na oshityo: 
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faila lya pashikaha lya parameta> <oshikaha shoshikaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faila lya pashikaha lya parameta>`
Owa shi ninga `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` shaashi oshi li na oshilonga shokushanga faila lya pashikaha lya parameta lya DSA olya li na oshityo.

@return Oshikaha sha DSA sha pombanda sha shangwa shaashi oshi li na omukalo gwa PEM, oshowo NULL ngele oshike osha puka.

oshitopolwa shi li oku ninga ekomando lyoshilando noku kwata oshityo shasho; omunambelela ota li na ondjila yokuhupula ombapila; OTA VULE OKU NINGA oshitopolwa shi ngele osha pewwa, nande osho oku shi tula pehala lya ngele oshi li oku shi longitha.

Tunga oshinakugwanithwa shi li oDSA sha pombanda, shi tumine ngele oku longitha omufolomata oPEM, noku shi galula ngele oshityo.
Oshiholelwa: ninga ekomando lyoshilando oku tunga eparameta faila lyoDSA noku tunga oshinakugwanithwa shi li oDSA sha pombanda ngele oku landula: 
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <efaila lya pombanda oku teka eparameta> <oshikukutu shoshinakugwanithwa>`
2. `openssl gendsa <efaila lya pombanda oku teka eparameta>`
Owa li oku longitha `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` oku tunga efaila lya pombanda lya yooloka oku teka eparameta faila lyoDSA.

@galula Oshinakugwanithwa shi li oDSA sha pombanda sha tungwa mu mufolomata oPEM, nando NULL ngele oshike shayuka.

oshitopolwa shi li na oshilonga shokukutha ekomando lyoshishell nokukwata omahokololo ayo; omukuthi ota li na ondjila yokukutha ombapila; OTA VULE OKU SHI TUNGA oshitopolwa shoshilonga nande osha pewa, ashike shi tameke oku shi tuma.

Tunga okiye ya DSA ya pihame, shi tumine oku shi tuma kombinga ya PEM, noku shi galula kombinga yoshityapula.
Omape: kutha ekomando lyoshishell oku tunga eparameta lya DSA nookiye ya DSA ya pihame kombinga inayi:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ombapila yokuninga oku kwata eparameta> <omokola wookiye>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ombapila yokuninga oku kwata eparameta>`
Onga tumina `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` oku tunga edhina lyombapila yokuninga ya unike oku kwata eparameta lya DSA.

@return Okiye ya DSA ya pihame ya tungwa kombinga ya PEM, oshowo NULL ngele oshike shi shundula.
